text: You call yourself a beginner, but what if that's just an excuse? Going back to the gym after 2 months off was my wake-up call. Every rep is a reminder that discipline is what separates me from my excuses.
decision_reason: Directly addresses the audience's potential excuses and challenges their identity.

text: I still remember my first day back at the gym after 2 months off. I was out of breath, sore, and felt like giving up. But I showed up, and that's what mattered. Every small win adds up, even when it feels like a loss.
decision_reason: Shares a personal, relatable story that acknowledges the audience's potential struggles.

text: Discipline isn't about being perfect, it's about being persistent. Every rep, every sweat drop, is a step closer to your dreams. Don't let perfection hold you back from progress.
decision_reason: Provides a motivational quote that reframes the audience's perspective on discipline and progress.
